name: review-loop
description: Adversarial review loop that iterates your proposal and diff to a clean pass — parallel Codex + Code Reviewer + Reality Checker review, merge/triage, minimal-change fixes, re-review until APPROVE/CLEAR or a configurable round cap. Optionally augments domain/method specialists per change (findings-only, no extra gate slot, never unlocks a clean APPROVE or offsets Codex absence); mechanically escalates a persistently-absent Codex to structural so /goal cannot dead-loop.
